user.title: Ventilation Reminder
user.description: Global settings. Rooms are added in the next step.

data_description.notify_services: If left empty, reminders appear as Home Assistant persistent notifications instead.
data_description.min_diff: Outside must be at least this much cooler than the room before a reminder is sent.
data_description.indoor_min_temp: Only remind if the room is at least this warm (prevents constant reminders in winter).
data_description.outdoor_humidity_sensors: If set, humidity reminders compare dew points instead of just requiring it to be cooler outside.
data_description.humidity_threshold: Rooms with humidity sensors are also flagged when humidity reaches this value and the air outside is drier.
data_description.delay_minutes: The condition must hold continuously for this long before notifying.
data_description.weather_entity: If set, reminders mention when a hot day is expected.
data_description.hot_day_temp: Forecast high at or above this value counts as a hot day.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description: Add your first room. You can add more rooms in the next step or later via the integration's Configure button.

data_description.humidity_sensors: If set, the room is also flagged when its humidity exceeds the global threshold while the air outside is drier.
data_description.window_sensors: If set, you are only reminded while all windows are closed, and reminded to close them once it warms up outside.

error.room_exists: A room with this name already exists.
